ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Language preferred by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "marketing_channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used in the campaign */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the campaign message displayed */,
  "language_displayed" TEXT /* Language in which the campaign message is displayed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who engaged with the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the user interacted with */,
  "date_served" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was served to the user */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., click, impression) */,
  "converted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user converted after engaging with the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign for which the report is generated */,
  "total_engagements" INTEGER /* Total number of engagements for the campaign */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions for the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate calculated as total conversions divided by total engagements */,
  "revenue_generated" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, marketer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "audience_name" TEXT /* Name of the audience (e.g., young adults, families) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_audiences" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target audience for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign-audience association record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign-audience association record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "audience_id")
)
